architecture.summary: Same DashboardServer process, in-memory Maps + JSONL flush, no SQLite, no new deps. POST /api/hooks/:event routes. Config flag hooks.httpMode for cutover.

integrations.summary: CC HTTP hooks protocol with 200 empty body (allow) or hookSpecificOutput JSON (deny). Command-bridge for 9 command-only events via http.request.

ui-ux.summary: HooksPage scrollable timeline with filtering by type/session/time, collapse consecutive same-type events, highlight errors. AgentsPage with agent lifecycle. Enhanced OverviewPage.

performance.summary: 50-500 events per session. JSONL handles fine. Rotate at 10MB. No unbounded growth concern.

security.summary: Localhost-only binding inherited from dashboard server. No auth needed on hook endpoint.

edge-cases.summary: CC treats HTTP failures as non-blocking. SessionStart auto-boots server. Config flag for clean switch, no dual-write. Manual start via specweave dashboard --hooks for dev.
